ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patent_applications" (
  "appno" INTEGER /* Unique application number for each patent application */,
  "pubdate" TEXT /* Publication date of the patent */,
  "pubnum" TEXT /* Publication number assigned by the patent office */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent application */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract summarizing the invention covered by the patent */,
  "filedate" TEXT /* Date the application file was created */,
  "priority_date" TEXT /* Priority date of the patent application */,
  "patent_type" TEXT /* Type of patent (e.g., Utility, Design, Plant) */,
  "ipc_code" TEXT /* International Patent Classification (IPC) code */,
  "cpc_code" TEXT /* Cooperative Patent Classification (CPC) code */,
  "uspc_code" TEXT /* United States Patent Classification (USPC) code */,
  "us_requisition" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patent application has a U.S. requisition */,
  "intl_filing_date" TEXT /* International filing date of the patent application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appno")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventors" (
  "inv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the inventor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inventor for contact */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization of the inventor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the inventor in the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the inventor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inventor for contact */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the inventor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignees" (
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the assignee organization or individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the assignee */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of assignee (e.g., University, Company, Individual) */,
  "representative" TEXT /* Name of the representative for the assignee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative for contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cross_references" (
  "xref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-reference entry */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number of the initial application */,
  "related_appno" INTEGER /* Application number of the related or referenced application */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the applications (e.g., Continuation, Divisional, Cited By) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship between the applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("xref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cross_references_related_appno FOREIGN KEY ("related_appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_interests" (
  "gov_int_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government interest entry */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number associated with the government interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the government interest in the patent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Government agency involved */,
  "award_number" TEXT /* Award number associated with the government interest */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gov_int_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_appno" INTEGER /* Parent application number */,
  "child_appno" INTEGER /* Child application number */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the applications (e.g., Continuation, Divisional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship between the applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_relations_child_appno FOREIGN KEY ("child_appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_relations_parent_appno FOREIGN KEY ("parent_appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_dates" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing date entry */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number related to the filing */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was filed */,
  "priority_date" TEXT /* Priority date of the application */,
  "intl_filing_date" TEXT /* International filing date of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Pending, Granted, Denied) */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventor_applications" (
  "inv_app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventor-application mapping */,
  "inv_id" INTEGER /* Inventor ID */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the inventor in the application (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inv_app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventor_applications_appno FOREIGN KEY ("appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventor_applications_inv_id FOREIGN KEY ("inv_id") REFERENCES inventors ("inv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Patent Attorney, Researcher, Admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user for contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the individual who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number associated with the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation entry */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number of the citing patent */,
  "cited_appno" INTEGER /* Application number of the cited patent */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., Cited By, Cites) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_citations_appno FOREIGN KEY ("appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_citations_cited_appno FOREIGN KEY ("cited_appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_examiners" (
  "examiner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examiner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the examiner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the examiner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the examiner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examiner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examiner_applications" (
  "examiner_app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examiner-application mapping */,
  "examiner_id" INTEGER /* Examiner ID */,
  "appno" INTEGER /* Application number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examiner_app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examiner_applications_examiner_id FOREIGN KEY ("examiner_id") REFERENCES patent_examiners ("examiner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examiner_applications_appno FOREIGN KEY ("appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_assignees" (
  "appno" INTEGER,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appno", "assignee_id"),
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_assignees_appno FOREIGN KEY ("appno") REFERENCES patent_applications ("appno"),
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_assignees_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES assignees ("assignee_id")
)
